wiki.summary: Flower Man is the battle theme of the final boss of Deltarune Chapter 5, Flowery. Although the track doesn't contain vocals itself, lyrics to the song can be seen on screen during Flowery's boss battle in game. The lyrics seem to be describing Asgore from Flowery's perspective. Read more on Last.fm.
